name: retrieve_hr_policy
description: Retrieve HR policy documents from Knowledge Base based on a query. Returns relevant policy sections with source references.

query.description: The HR policy question or topic to search for

name: check_leave_balance
description: Check an employee's current leave balance by type (annual, sick, personal).

employee_id.description: Employee ID to check balance for

leave_type.description: Type of leave, one of: annual, sick, personal, all

name: submit_leave_request
description: Submit a leave request for an employee.

leave_type.description: Type of leave, one of: annual, sick, personal, marriage, parental, bereavement

name: query_salary_info
description: Query salary structure information for a given role level or department.

query.description: Query about salary structure, benefits, or compensation
